points_en: India gained independence in a very challenging international context, just after the devastation of the Second World War.
The world was polarized into two massive camps led by the US and the USSR (the Cold War era).
Prime Minister Jawaharlal Nehru was also the Foreign Minister.
The three major objectives of Nehru's foreign policy were preserving sovereignty, protecting territorial integrity, and promoting economic development.
points_hi: भारत ने द्वितीय विश्व युद्ध के बाद स्वतंत्रता प्राप्त की।
दुनिया दो गुटों में बंटी थी।
उनकी विदेश नीति के तीन उद्देश्य थे।
